THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IPAC, ERLINDA P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
